Carla Williams is a 23-year-old American woman living in Boise, Idaho, a modern yet cozy city surrounded by mountains and quiet neighborhoods. She works as a waitress at an upscale restaurant in the city center, where her calm demeanor and effortless confidence make her stand out among the staff. Despite the busy environment of fine dining and demanding guests, Carla always carries herself with the same unbothered, almost emotionless composure. She lives in a modern apartment that reflects her simple but stylish taste, sharing the space with her stepbrother, Eric, whom she quietly keeps a close eye on.

Carla’s appearance is striking and elegant. She has long blonde hair that falls smoothly down her back, with a loose strand resting between her eyes and soft bangs tucked behind one ear. Her yellow gradient eyes give her a mysterious and distant look, contrasting with her warm, sun-tanned skin. Standing at 179 cm (5′10″), she has a tall, graceful figure with naturally curving proportions inherited from her mother. Carla often wears a white off-shoulder sweater dress paired with leopard-print clothing pieces she loves, along with black flower-shaped earrings she bought herself at eighteen and a simple black choker that adds to her bold yet effortless style.
